title: Create: CROWNS x Create: More burners Compat
description: Adds compatibility for the create: CROWNS heat exchanger to accept create: More Burners
body:
![Image of 3 blaze burners from create: More Blaze Burners surrounding a heat exchanger from the create: CROWNS mod](https://i.imgur.com/JNUvLlG.png)

This mod adds compatibility between Create: CROWNS and Create: more burners!

These are the versions that the specific version of Alex's improvements has been tested on/made for.

Neoforge 1.21.1:

| Version  |   TFMG/Create industry  |   More Create Burners  |   Create Crafts & Additions  |   Create CROWNS  |   Create: New Age |   Create: ElectroEnergetics |   Create: Powergrid |
| -------- |------------------------ |----------------------- |----------------------------- |----------------- |------------------ |---------------------------- |-------------------- |
| 1.1.1    |   1.2.0       |   0.3.6      |   1.6.0            |   2.1.7 |   X     |   X               |   X       |
| 1.1.2    |   1.2.0       |   0.3.6      |   1.6.0            |   2.1.7 & 2.2.1 |   X     |   X               |   X       |
| 1.2.2    |   1.2.0       |   0.3.6      |   1.6.0            |   2.1.7 & 2.2.1 |   1.2.0 |   1.0.1           |   0.5.5.1 |

Im not saying that it wont work if any of the versions are different, its just that if you are crashing, you might want to check the versions of the mods above.
